title: Cracked & Fractured
body:
## Cracked & Fractured 

Cracked & Fractured is a mod that adds Cracked Variants of blocks and a few items & tools.
This Mod is currently in a pretty early stage so some bugs might occur, 

### Currently only 2 cracked variants are present but more will come soon

## Features & Functionality 
The Fracturer Tool can be used on (currently) Polished Tuff and Polished Deepslate to turn them into their Cracked counterparts. The Cracked Blocks can also be achieved by Blasting in a Blast Furnace.

By blasting or stonecutting the already Cracked Variants you can get Cracked Fragments, Cracked Fragments allow you to return the Cracked Item back into its "full form" such as:
**Cracked Polished Deepslate -> Polished Deepslate**

Cracked & Fractured also introduces a few new Crafting, Smelting & Blasting Recipes for Vanilla blocks (Deepslate Bricks, Cracked Tuff Brick, Tuff & More) 

This is my first "Mod" that I've coded so if there are any bugs, suggestion or feature requests either DM 4_Square or post on the "Issues" tab in the GitHub
